originalTitle: Warhammer 40,000: Darktide - Skitarii | Class Reveal Trailer
content: The Skitarii class is coming to Warhammer 40,000: Darktide June 23. Wishlist now on Steam: ► https://fatshark.games/08TKqZ The Adeptus Mechanicus will not see the secrets of Hive Tertium fall into the hands of heretics, the Skitarii Alpha Primus are elite operatives devoted to serving the will of the Omnissiah. They will annihilate all who stand in their way. Learn more about Darktide's new class ► https://fatshark.games/lfMTcr Don't miss the massive savings during Warhammer Skulls (May 21-28) on all Fatshark Warhammer games, DLCs and digital upgrades. ► https://fatshark.games/8ItMLU Check out the new Arbites and Hive Scum class bundle on Steam. ► https://fatshark.games/SdXaV0 ________________________________________________________________________________________ Learn more about Darktide on the official website: ► https://fatshark.games/HdwS01 Subscribe to the Darktide newsletter ► https://fatshark.games/rzGOql Follow the Darktide socials ► https://fatshark.games/N8eiJB
chineseTitle: 战锤 40,000：暗潮 - 护教军 | 战锤 40,000：暗潮班级揭晓预告片
chineseContent: 护教军阶级将于 6 月 23 日登陆《战锤 40,000：暗潮》。 Steam 上的愿望清单：► https://fatshark.games/08TKqZ 机械修会不会看到第三蜂巢的秘密落入异教徒手中，护教军阿尔法元始者是致力于服务奥姆尼西亚意志的精英特工。他们将消灭所有阻碍他们的人。了解有关 Darktide 新职业的更多信息 ► https://fatshark.games/lfMTcr 不要错过战锤头骨（5 月 21 日至 28 日）期间所有 Fatshark 战锤游戏、DLC 和数字升级的巨额优惠。 ► https://fatshark.games/8ItMLU 在 Steam 上查看新的 Arbites 和 Hive Scum 类捆绑包。 ► https://fatshark.games/SdXaV0 ____________________________________________________________________________________________ 在官方网站上了解有关 Darktide 的更多信息： ► https://fatshark.games/HdwS01 订阅 Darktide 时事通讯 ► https://fatshark.games/rzGOql 关注 Darktide 社交 ► https://fatshark.games/N8eiJB
